[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows large black text on a white background, with the word “rad hio” partially visible at the top left.  

Main Subject:  
The main focus is the oversized, lowercase text “rad hio” on the first line and “diem” and “aja” on subsequent lines, with each word appearing in separate lines.  

Setting:  
The setting is a simple plain white background with no visible environment, objects, or lighting beyond a flat, high-contrast graphic look.  

Visual Details:  
The text is black and uses a clean sans-serif style, aligned to the left. The first line shows “radhio,” with the “r” and the rest of the word visible in the top left area. The second and third lines read “diem” and “aja,” respectively, with noticeable spacing between lines. The image appears cropped, so only part of the full text is visible.

Practical Summary:  
The image is a cropped graphic consisting of large black lowercase words on a white background. It displays the lines “radhio,” “diem,” and “aja,” with the layout left-aligned and stacked vertically.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
